requestBody.description: Registration data including organization ID, email, password, and role.

200.description: Returns the JWT token and expiration date.

400.description: Email already in use or invalid input data.

post.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

200.description: Returns the JWT token and expiration date.

401.description: Invalid credentials or account locked.

post.summary: Generates a password reset token for the given email.
post.description: Always returns 200 OK to prevent email enumeration. The reset token is included in the response body if the email exists.

requestBody.description: The email address associated with the account.

200.description: Reset token generated, or silently ignored if email not found.

post.summary: Resets the user's password using a reset token.

requestBody.description: Email address, reset token, and the new password.

200.description: Password reset successfully.

400.description: Invalid email or token, or new password does not meet requirements.

requestBody.description: Email address, current password, and the new password.

200.description: Password changed successfully.

400.description: Invalid email, incorrect current password, or new password does not meet requirements.

200.description: List of all customers.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

requestBody.description: Customer data including name, document, contact info, and optional addresses.

201.description: Customer created successfully. Returns the new customer with its assigned ID.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

post.summary: Creates a new stock entry, registering products received from a supplier.

requestBody.description: Stock entry data including supplier ID and the list of products with received quantities.

201.description: Stock entry created successfully. Returns the new entry with its assigned ID and generated movements.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the stock entry.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the stock entry.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product.
